title: A continuously assigned unpacked array literal is parsed wrong
body:
Compilation of the following SystemVerilog module throws an error:

```
module a(output bit b [0:0]);
  assign b = '{'b0};
endmodule: a
```

Command:
```
iverilog -g2012 test.sv
```

Error output:
```
error: scalar type is not a valid context for assignment pattern.
error: Unable to elaborate r-value: '{'d0}
```

Expected behavior:
The module is compiled successfully

This issue occurs in `Icarus Verilog version 13.0 (devel) (s20221226-572-gb74511974)`
code_blocks:
error: scalar type is not a valid context for assignment pattern.
error: Unable to elaborate r-value: '{'d0}
